name: Reactionary
benefit: +2 trait bonus on initiative checks.

name: Armor Expert
benefit: Reduce armor check penalty by 1 (minimum 0).

name: Bullied
benefit: +1 trait bonus on attacks of opportunity with unarmed strikes.

name: Courageous
benefit: +2 trait bonus on saving throws against fear effects.

name: Deft Dodger
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Reflex saves.

name: Dirty Fighter
benefit: +1 trait bonus on damage when flanking.

name: Fencer
benefit: +1 trait bonus on attacks of opportunity with blades.

name: Killer
benefit: Deal additional damage equal to weapon's critical hit modifier on a confirmed critical hit.

name: Resilient
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Fortitude saves.

name: Anatomist
benefit: +1 trait bonus on rolls to confirm critical hits.

name: Magical Knack
benefit: +2 trait bonus to caster level (max = character level).

name: Focused Mind
benefit: +2 trait bonus on concentration checks.

name: Hedge Magician
benefit: Reduce cost of crafting magic items by 5%.

name: Magical Lineage
benefit: Pick one spell; its total level adjustment from metamagic is reduced by 1.

name: Magical Talent
benefit: Choose a 0-level spell; cast it once per day as a spell-like ability.

name: Classically Schooled
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Spellcraft checks, and Spellcraft is a class skill.

name: Dangerously Curious
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Use Magic Device checks, and UMD is a class skill.

name: Mathematical Prodigy
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (arcana) and Knowledge (engineering).

name: Self-Taught Scholar
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Linguistics checks, and it is a class skill.

name: Fast-Talker
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Bluff checks, and Bluff is a class skill.

name: Charming
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Bluff and Diplomacy vs attracted creatures.

name: Child of the Streets
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Sleight of Hand checks, and it is a class skill.

name: Convincing Liar
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Bluff and Intimidate checks.

name: Natural-Born Leader
benefit: +1 trait bonus on all cohort, follower, and companion morale checks.

name: Poverty-Stricken
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Survival checks, and Survival is a class skill.

name: Rich Parents
benefit: Start with 900 gp instead of normal starting gold.

name: Suspicious
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Sense Motive checks, and it is a class skill.

name: Talented
benefit: +1 trait bonus on one Perform skill, and it is a class skill.

name: Birthmark
benefit: +2 trait bonus on saving throws against charm and compulsion effects.

name: Devotee of the Green
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (nature) and Knowledge (geography).

name: Ease of Faith
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Diplomacy checks, and Diplomacy is a class skill.

name: History of Heresy
benefit: +1 trait bonus on saving throws against divine spells.

name: Indomitable Faith
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Will saves.

name: Sacred Touch
benefit: Automatically stabilize a dying creature as a standard action.

name: Scholar of the Great Beyond
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (history) and Knowledge (planes).

name: Undead Slayer
benefit: +1 trait bonus on weapon damage rolls against undead.

name: Veteran of Battle
benefit: +1 trait bonus on initiative checks, draw a weapon as a free action during surprise round.

name: Giant Slayer
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Bluff, Perception, and Sense Motive checks against giants, +1 on attack and damage against giants.

name: Hagfish Hopeful
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Fortitude saves, you've drunk the water at the Hagfish tavern in Sandpoint.

name: Merchant Family
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Appraise checks, and Appraise is a class skill. Start with extra 300 gp.

name: Monster Hunter
benefit: +1 trait bonus on attack rolls and weapon damage rolls against aberrations and magical beasts.

name: Scholar of the Ancients
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (arcana) and Knowledge (history) relating to Thassilon.

name: Student of Faith
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (religion) and Knowledge (arcana), one is always a class skill.

name: Sandpoint Local
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (local) checks about Sandpoint, and it is a class skill.

name: Sczarni Connection
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Bluff and Intimidate checks when dealing with Sczarni.

name: Thassilonian Tattoo
benefit: +1 caster level for spells of one chosen school of magic. Must have a Thassilonian tattoo.

name: Anxious
benefit: You struggle with constant worry. -2 penalty on saves vs fear effects when in a stressful situation or combat for the first time each day.

name: Attached
benefit: You are emotionally attached to a specific item. -1 penalty on Will saves when item is not in your possession, -2 if item is lost or destroyed.

name: Avarice
benefit: You covet wealth above all else. -2 penalty on any skill check to resist being bribed or tempted by monetary reward. Must succeed a DC 15 Will save to voluntarily part with treasure.

name: Betrayed
benefit: You have been deeply betrayed. Roll twice and take the lower result on Sense Motive checks to get hunches. Cannot reroll even with other abilities.

name: Bitter
benefit: You harbor deep resentment. -2 penalty on Diplomacy checks when attempting to make requests, and -2 on Bluff checks when pretending to be friendly.

name: Burned
benefit: You have been badly burned in the past. -1 penalty on saving throws against fire effects. -1 on Reflex saves to avoid catching fire.

name: Condescending
benefit: You look down on those you consider beneath you. -5 penalty on Diplomacy and Intimidate checks against creatures with lower CR than your level.

name: Cowardly
benefit: You are easily frightened. Increase the duration of any fear effect against you by 1 round. You take a -2 penalty on saves against fear effects.

name: Cruelty
benefit: You enjoy causing pain. -2 penalty on attack rolls against foes who are neither dying nor helpless when there are dying or helpless creatures within 30 feet.

name: Dependent
benefit: You are devoted to a specific NPC. -2 penalty on Will saves when that NPC is in danger. If NPC dies, -1 on all saves for one month.

name: Doubt
benefit: You lack confidence. -4 penalty on saves against fear effects. If you fail, duration of fear is doubled.

name: Empty Mask
benefit: You hide your true self behind a persona. -1 penalty on Will saves vs compulsion. Penalty increases to -2 against foes who know your true identity.

name: Entomophobe
benefit: You have a crippling fear of vermin. -2 penalty on attack rolls, saving throws, skill checks, and ability checks when within 30 feet of a vermin creature.

name: Envy
benefit: You are consumed by envy. -2 penalty on Diplomacy and Sense Motive checks against any creature whose level or Hit Dice exceed your own.

name: Family Ties
benefit: Your family makes demands. When contacted by family, you must succeed a DC 15 Will save or spend time/money helping them. -2 penalty on saves vs charm/compulsion from family.

name: Fey-Taken
benefit: You were touched by fey magic as a child. -2 penalty on saves against fey spells and spell-like abilities. -1 on saves vs enchantment effects from any source.

name: Fiend Blood
benefit: Fiendish taint runs in your veins. You take 1 additional point of damage from holy water and good-aligned channeled energy.

name: Forgetful
benefit: Your memory is unreliable. -2 penalty on Knowledge checks to recall information you previously learned. Must make a DC 10 Intelligence check to remember details.

name: Foul Brand
benefit: You bear an embarrassing or incriminating mark. -2 penalty on Diplomacy and Disguise checks when the brand is visible.

name: Guilty Fraud
benefit: You secretly believe your successes are undeserved. -2 penalty on saves vs mind-affecting effects from anyone who knows of your achievements.

name: Haunted
benefit: Haunted by a past event. -2 penalty on saves against fear. Once per day when you fail a fear save, you are shaken for an additional round.

name: Haunting Regret
benefit: A terrible mistake gnaws at you. -2 penalty on saves vs emotion-based effects. If you fail, the effect's duration increases by 1 round.

name: Headstrong
benefit: You refuse to back down from any challenge. -2 penalty on Will saves vs compulsions that would make you flee or retreat from a confrontation.

name: Hedonistic
benefit: You crave luxury and comfort. Any day you do not have access to comfortable food and lodging, you are fatigued for 4 hours the following morning.

name: Helpless
benefit: You freeze in dire situations. -2 penalty on initiative when surprised. Flat-footed for an additional round at the start of any combat where you are surprised.

name: Impatient
benefit: You can't stand to wait. -2 penalty on skill checks that require more than a full-round action to complete. Cannot take 20 on skill checks.

name: Infamous
benefit: You have a terrible reputation. -4 penalty on Diplomacy checks to improve NPC attitudes. Starting attitude of NPCs who know your reputation is one step worse.

name: Insatiable
benefit: You require more sustenance than normal. You require twice the normal amount of food and water or become fatigued.

name: Lonely
benefit: You crave companionship. -2 penalty on Will saves when no ally is within 30 feet. -1 on all saves when you have been alone for more than 24 hours.

name: Loner
benefit: You distrust others. -1 penalty on Aid Another checks and on skill checks to assist allies. Allies take -1 on Aid Another checks to assist you.

name: Lovesick
benefit: You are consumed by love for a specific person. -2 penalty on initiative and Perception at the start of each day when away from that person.

name: Magical Klutz
benefit: Magic items malfunction around you. 5% chance each time you activate a magic item that it doesn't function (roll d20, fail on 1).

name: Mark of Slavery
benefit: You bear the brand of a former slave. -2 penalty on any skill check or attack roll made on your next turn after you fail a skill check.

name: Meticulous
benefit: You obsess over details. -2 penalty on skill checks as part of a rushed action or when taking 10 isn't possible.

name: Misbegotten
benefit: Your appearance is unsettling. -2 penalty on Diplomacy and Disguise checks. Starting NPC attitudes may be one step worse in civilized areas.

name: Naive
benefit: You believe everyone is innately good. -2 penalty to AC against attacks with improvised weapons and -2 to CMD against dirty trick maneuvers.

name: Nervous
benefit: Your nerves are frayed. When you take 10 on a skill check that has a penalty for failure, treat the result as if you had rolled an 8 instead of 10.

name: Oblivious
benefit: You pay little attention to your surroundings. -2 penalty on Sense Motive checks and sight-based Perception checks.

name: Occult Bargain
benefit: You made a pact with an otherworldly entity. -2 on saves vs effects from outsiders. Entity may make demands at the GM's discretion.

name: Overprotective
benefit: You blame yourself when allies are harmed. -2 penalty on attack rolls and skill checks for 1 round whenever an ally within 30 feet takes damage.

name: Paranoid
benefit: You distrust everyone. -2 penalty on Diplomacy and Aid Another checks. Cannot benefit from Aid Another unless the helper succeeds by 5 or more.

name: Power-Hungry
benefit: You crave authority. -2 penalty on Will saves against charm and compulsion from creatures with perceived authority over you.

name: Pride
benefit: You can't abide challenges to your dignity. -2 penalty on Diplomacy and Sense Motive against anyone who has threatened, accused, or challenged you until they apologize.

name: Provincial
benefit: You are uncomfortable outside your homeland. -2 penalty on Diplomacy, Knowledge (local), and Sense Motive checks in unfamiliar regions.

name: Reckless
benefit: You charge in without thinking. Cannot use the withdrawal action. Acrobatics DC to avoid AoOs is opponent's CMD +5.

name: Sentimental
benefit: You form emotional bonds quickly. -2 penalty on Sense Motive checks against anyone you've known for at least 24 hours.

name: Shadow-Scarred
benefit: Exposure to shadow magic left its mark. -2 on saves vs shadow and darkness spells/effects. -1 on Perception in dim light.

name: Sheltered
benefit: You know little of violence. Whenever you have less than half your maximum hit points, you are shaken.

name: Sleepy
benefit: You need more sleep than most. You require 10 hours of sleep to be fully rested (instead of 8). -2 on Perception while on watch.

name: Spooked
benefit: Supernatural things terrify you. -2 penalty on saves vs fear from undead, outsiders, and haunts. Shaken for 1 round when first confronting such creatures.

name: Stigmatized
benefit: You are associated with something others find distasteful. -3 penalty on Diplomacy checks to improve NPC attitudes in communities that know your stigma.

name: Superstitious
benefit: You distrust arcane magic. -2 on saves against beneficial arcane spells cast by allies. Must succeed DC 15 Will save to accept beneficial arcane magic willingly.

name: Tainted Spirit
benefit: Your spirit carries a stain. Positive channeled energy heals you for 1 less per die. Negative energy damages you for 1 more per die.

name: Unlearned
benefit: You have difficulty retaining knowledge. Cannot attempt untrained Knowledge checks, even if the DC is 10 or lower.

name: Vain
benefit: You are obsessed with your appearance. -2 on saves against flattery-based Diplomacy and Bluff. When insulted about appearance, -2 on all checks for 1 hour.

name: Vainglory
benefit: You need recognition for your deeds. -2 on attack rolls and skill checks for 1 hour after another party member receives praise or recognition that you don't.

name: Warded Against Nature
benefit: Animals sense something unnatural about you. -2 on Handle Animal and Ride checks. Animals' starting attitude toward you is one step worse.

name: Xenophobic
benefit: You distrust those of different races. -2 penalty on Diplomacy and Sense Motive against creatures of a different race.

name: Zealous
benefit: Your faith borders on fanaticism. -2 on Diplomacy and Sense Motive vs those who don't share your faith. DC 15 Will save to cooperate with those who oppose your deity.
